Ring of Piety

When an enemy is killed, the ring wearer restores 35000 health in self over 2,1 sec. When this ability triggers, there is a 50% chance of restoring 10000 health in a random ally whose health is not at its max over 2,1 sec. Triggers once in a 5 sec or even more seldom.

Requirements: 98-100
